subject: current_affairs
question: भारताचे ५३ वे सरन्यायाधीश (CJI) म्हणून २४ नोव्हेंबर २०२५ रोजी कोणी शपथ घेतली? / Who took oath as the 53rd Chief Justice of India (CJI) on 24 November 2025?
options: A. न्या. संजीव खन्ना / Justice Sanjiv Khanna
B. न्या. सूर्य कांत / Justice Surya Kant
C. न्या. बी. आर. गवई / Justice B. R. Gavai
D. न्या. धनंजय चंद्रचूड / Justice D. Y. Chandrachud
explanation: Justice Surya Kant, former Advocate General for Haryana, became the 53rd CJI on 24 November 2025.

subject: current_affairs
question: २ जून २०२६ रोजी सर्वोच्च न्यायालयाच्या पाच नवीन न्यायाधीशांना शपथ देण्यात आली; बारमधून थेट सर्वोच्च न्यायालयात नियुक्त झालेल्या दुसऱ्या महिला कोण ठरल्या? / On 2 June 2026, five new Supreme Court judges took oath; who became only the second woman directly elevated from the Bar to the Supreme Court?
options: B. बी. व्ही. नागरत्ना / B. V. Nagarathna
explanation: Senior Advocate V. Mohana became the second woman (after Justice Indu Malhotra in 2018) directly elevated from the Bar to the Supreme Court.

subject: current_affairs
question: लोकसभेच्या जागा ५४३ वरून वाढवण्याचा प्रस्ताव असलेले विधेयक एप्रिल २०२६ मध्ये लोकसभेत सादर करण्यात आले, त्याचे नाव काय आहे? / The bill proposing to increase Lok Sabha seats from 543, introduced in Lok Sabha in April 2026, is called what?
options: A. संविधान (१२९ वी दुरुस्ती) विधेयक, २०२६ / Constitution (129th Amendment) Bill, 2026
B. संविधान (१३१ वी दुरुस्ती) विधेयक, २०२६ / Constitution (131st Amendment) Bill, 2026
D. महिला आरक्षण विधेयक, २०२३ / Women's Reservation Bill, 2023
explanation: The Constitution (131st Amendment) Bill, 2026, along with the Union Territories Laws (Amendment) Bill and Delimitation Bill 2026, was introduced in the Lok Sabha on 16 April 2026.

subject: current_affairs
question: प्रजासत्ताक दिन २०२६ (७७ वा) निमित्त जाहीर झालेल्या पद्म पुरस्कारांमध्ये एकूण किती प्राप्तकर्त्यांचा समावेश होता? / How many total recipients were named in the Padma Awards announced on the eve of the 77th Republic Day 2026?
explanation: The 2026 Padma Awards list comprised 131 recipients: 5 Padma Vibhushan, 13 Padma Bhushan and 113 Padma Shri.

subject: current_affairs
question: २०२६ च्या पद्म विभूषण पुरस्कारांमध्ये मरणोत्तर सन्मानित करण्यात आलेले प्रसिद्ध अभिनेते कोण होते? / Which noted actor was honoured posthumously with the Padma Vibhushan in the 2026 list?
options: B. धर्मेंद्र सिंग देओल / Dharmendra Singh Deol
explanation: Veteran actor Dharmendra Singh Deol was honoured with the Padma Vibhushan (posthumously) in the 2026 awards list, along with former Kerala CM V. S. Achuthanandan.

subject: current_affairs
question: मार्च २०२६ मध्ये झालेल्या राज्यपाल फेरबदलामध्ये महाराष्ट्राचे नवीन राज्यपाल म्हणून कोणाची नियुक्ती झाली? / In the gubernatorial reshuffle of March 2026, who was appointed as the new Governor of Maharashtra?
options: B. भगतसिंग कोश्यारी / Bhagat Singh Koshyari
C. जिष्णु देव वर्मा / Jishnu Dev Varma
D. सी. पी. राधाकृष्णन / C. P. Radhakrishnan
explanation: Jishnu Dev Varma, previously Governor of Telangana, was transferred as the new Governor of Maharashtra from 10 March 2026 as part of a nine-state gubernatorial reshuffle.

subject: current_affairs
question: भारताची १६ वी जनगणना (Census 2027) ही देशाच्या इतिहासातील पहिली कोणत्या प्रकारची जनगणना ठरणार आहे? / India's 16th Census (Census 2027) will be historic as the country's first census of what kind?
options: A. फक्त शहरी भागांची जनगणना / Urban-areas-only census
B. पूर्णपणे डिजिटल जनगणना / Fully digital census
C. दर पाच वर्षांनी होणारी जनगणना / Census held every five years
D. फक्त आर्थिक जनगणना / Purely economic census
explanation: Census 2027 is India's first fully digital census, using mobile apps for enumerators and a self-enumeration portal in 16 languages, with Phase I (House Listing) starting 1 April 2026.

subject: current_affairs
question: Census 2027 मध्ये जातनिहाय गणना (caste enumeration) किती वर्षांनंतर प्रथमच होत आहे? / Census 2027 will include caste enumeration for the first time since which earlier census year?
explanation: Caste enumeration is being conducted in Census 2027 for the first time since the 1931 census.

subject: current_affairs
question: सप्टेंबर २०२५ पासून लागू झालेल्या GST सुधारणांनंतर बहुतांश वस्तू व सेवांसाठी मुख्य कर स्लॅब कोणते ठेवण्यात आले? / After the GST reforms effective from September 2025, what are the main simplified tax slabs for most goods and services?
explanation: The GST reforms merged the four-tier structure into mainly two slabs — 5% for essential goods and 18% for standard goods/services, with 40% for luxury/sin goods, effective 22 September 2025.

subject: current_affairs
question: GST सुधारणांनंतर आरोग्य व जीवन विमा हप्त्यांवरील GST दर किती करण्यात आला? / After the GST reforms, what is the new GST rate on health and life insurance premiums?
explanation: GST on individual health and life insurance premiums was completely removed (reduced to 0%) as part of the September 2025 GST reforms.

subject: current_affairs
question: इस्रोच्या गगनयान-१ मानवरहित चाचणी मोहिमेत कोणता अर्ध-मानवरूपी रोबोट (हॅाफ-ह्युमनॉइड) पाठवला जाणार आहे? / Which half-humanoid robot is set to be sent aboard ISRO's uncrewed Gaganyaan-1 test mission?
explanation: Vyommitra, ISRO's half-humanoid robot, will fly on the Gaganyaan-1 uncrewed mission scheduled for the second half of 2026 to simulate astronaut life-support conditions.

subject: current_affairs
question: मे २०२६ मध्ये केंद्रीय मंत्रिमंडळाने किती कोटी रुपयांच्या कोळसा वायुनिर्मिती (कोल गॅसिफिकेशन) योजनेला मंजुरी दिली? / In May 2026, the Union Cabinet approved a Coal Gasification Scheme worth how much money?
explanation: The Union Cabinet approved a ₹37,500 crore Coal Gasification Scheme in May 2026, along with the ₹20,667 crore Ahmedabad (Sarkhej)-Dholera rail project.
